UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile and core demographic information in the PulseFlow application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

activityLevel.description: The user's self-reported physical activity level.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

DailyMetric.title: DailyMetric
DailyMetric.description: Records daily health and activity metrics for a user, serving as the basis for the dashboard and progress tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DailyMetric entry.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this metric belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N DailyMetric)

date.description: The date for which these metrics are recorded.

caloriesConsumed.description: Total calories consumed on this day.

proteinGrams.description: Total protein consumed on this day in grams.

carbohydrateGrams.description: Total carbohydrates consumed on this day in grams.

fatGrams.description: Total fat consumed on this day in grams.

hydrationMl.description: Total water intake on this day in milliliters.

stepsCount.description: Total steps counted on this day.

weightKg.description: User's recorded weight on this day in kilograms.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the daily metric was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the daily metric was last updated.

Goal.title: Goal
Goal.description: Represents a user's health and fitness goals, which can be user-defined or AI-suggested.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Goal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this goal belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Goal)

type.description: The category or type of the goal (e.g., 'weight_loss', 'muscle_gain', 'hydration', 'steps', 'nutrition').

targetValue.description: The numerical target value for the goal (e.g., 70 for 70kg, 10000 for 10000 steps).

targetUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the target value (e.g., 'kg', 'steps', 'ml', 'grams').

startDate.description: The date when the goal started.

endDate.description: The target date for achieving the goal.

status.description: The current status of the goal (e.g., 'active', 'completed', 'archived').

description.description: A detailed description of the goal.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the goal was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the goal was last updated.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a daily actionable item for a user, either self-assigned or AI-suggested.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this task belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Task)

goalId.description: Optional reference to a Goal this task contributes to. (Relationship: Goal 1:N Task)

description.description: A description of the task to be completed.

dueDate.description: The date by which the task is due.

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the task has been completed.

suggestedByAI.description: Indicates if this task was suggested by the AI tool.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated.

Meal.title: Meal
Meal.description: Represents a single meal logged by a user, part of their daily nutrition tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Meal entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who logged this meal. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Meal)

dailyMetricId.description: Reference to the DailyMetric entry for the day this meal was consumed. (Relationship: DailyMetric 1:N Meal)

mealTime.description: The specific date and time when the meal was consumed.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments about the meal.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the meal was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the meal was last updated.

FoodItem.title: FoodItem
FoodItem.description: A database-agnostic representation of an individual food item, used in meal tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FoodItem entity.

name.description: The name of the food item (e.g., 'Chicken Breast', 'Apple', 'Oats').

brand.description: The brand of the food item, if applicable.

caloriesPer100g.description: Number of calories per 100 grams of the food item.

proteinPer100g.description: Amount of protein per 100 grams of the food item.

carbohydratePer100g.description: Amount of carbohydrates per 100 grams of the food item.

fatPer100g.description: Amount of fat per 100 grams of the food item.

isUserCreated.description: Indicates if this food item was created by a user (vs. a system-provided item).

creatorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this food item, if 'isUserCreated' is true. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N FoodItem)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the food item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the food item was last updated.

MealEntry.title: MealEntry
MealEntry.description: Represents a specific food item consumed as part of a meal, linking Meal to FoodItem.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MealEntry entity.

mealId.description: Reference to the Meal this entry belongs to. (Relationship: Meal 1:N MealEntry)

foodItemId.description: Reference to the FoodItem consumed. (Relationship: FoodItem 1:N MealEntry)

quantityGrams.description: The quantity of the food item consumed in grams.

servingSizeDescription.description: An optional description of the serving size (e.g., '1 large apple', '2 slices').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the meal entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the meal entry was last updated.

Exercise.title: Exercise
Exercise.description: A database-agnostic representation of an individual exercise, used in workout management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Exercise entity.

name.description: The name of the exercise (e.g., 'Bench Press', 'Squat', 'Running').

muscleGroup.description: The primary muscle group targeted by the exercise (e.g., 'Chest', 'Legs', 'Cardio').

description.description: A description or instructions for performing the exercise.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the exercise (e.g., 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced').

isUserCreated.description: Indicates if this exercise was created by a user (vs. a system-provided item).

creatorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created this exercise, if 'isUserCreated' is true. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Exercise)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the exercise was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the exercise was last updated.

Workout.title: Workout
Workout.description: Represents a single workout session logged by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Workout entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who performed this workout. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Workout)

dailyMetricId.description: Reference to the DailyMetric entry for the day this workout was performed. (Relationship: DailyMetric 1:N Workout)

name.description: A descriptive name for the workout session (e.g., 'Leg Day', 'Full Body A').

startTime.description: The date and time when the workout started.

endTime.description: The date and time when the workout ended.

durationMinutes.description: The total duration of the workout in minutes.

notes.description: Optional notes or comments about the workout session.

workoutSplitDayId.description: Optional reference to a SplitDay if this workout was part of a planned split. (Relationship: SplitDay 1:N Workout)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the workout was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the workout was last updated.

WorkoutExercise.title: WorkoutExercise
WorkoutExercise.description: Details the performance of a specific exercise within a workout session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkoutExercise entry.

workoutId.description: Reference to the Workout session this exercise belongs to. (Relationship: Workout 1:N WorkoutExercise)

exerciseId.description: Reference to the Exercise performed. (Relationship: Exercise 1:N WorkoutExercise)

sets.description: The number of sets performed for this exercise.

repsPerSet.description: The number of repetitions per set for this exercise.

weightKg.description: The weight used for this exercise in kilograms (can be 0 for bodyweight exercises).

notes.description: Optional notes for this specific exercise performance (e.g., 'struggled on last rep').

orderIndex.description: The order in which this exercise was performed within the workout.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the workout exercise entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the workout exercise entry was last updated.

PersonalRecord.title: PersonalRecord
PersonalRecord.description: Tracks a user's best performance for a specific exercise.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PersonalRecord entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this personal record belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N PersonalRecord)

exerciseId.description: Reference to the Exercise for which this record was achieved. (Relationship: Exercise 1:N PersonalRecord)

value.description: The numerical value of the personal record.

unit.description: The unit of measurement for the record value (e.g., 'kg', 'reps', 'minutes').

recordedDate.description: The date when this personal record was achieved.

workoutExerciseId.description: Optional reference to the WorkoutExercise entry during which this PR was achieved. (Relationship: WorkoutExercise 1:N PersonalRecord)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the personal record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the personal record was last updated.

WorkoutSplit.title: WorkoutSplit
WorkoutSplit.description: Represents a customizable workout routine or 'split' composed of multiple workout days.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkoutSplit entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who created or owns this workout split. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N WorkoutSplit)

name.description: A descriptive name for the workout split (e.g., '3 Day Full Body', 'Push Pull Legs').

description.description: An optional description of the workout split.

isActive.description: Indicates if this workout split is currently active for the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the workout split was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the workout split was last updated.

SplitDay.title: SplitDay
SplitDay.description: Represents a single day within a WorkoutSplit, outlining the exercises planned for that day.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SplitDay entity.

workoutSplitId.description: Reference to the WorkoutSplit this day belongs to. (Relationship: WorkoutSplit 1:N SplitDay)

dayNumber.description: The sequential number of the day within the split (e.g., 1 for Day 1, 2 for Day 2).

name.description: A descriptive name for this specific split day (e.g., 'Leg Day', 'Upper Body').

exerciseIds.description: References to Exercises planned for this split day. (Relationship: Exercise N:N SplitDay)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the split day was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the split day was last updated.

definition.description: Root collection for user profiles. Each document ID (`userId`) corresponds to `request.auth.uid`. Includes denormalized 'id' field matching the document ID for authorization independence.
Subcollection for a user's daily health and activity metrics. Documents include denormalized 'userId' and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence and QAP support.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: dailyMetricId
params.description: The unique ID for the DailyMetric entry.

definition.description: Subcollection for a user's health and fitness goals. Documents include denormalized 'userId' and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence and QAP support.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: goalId
params.description: The unique ID for the Goal entry.

definition.description: Subcollection for a user's daily actionable tasks. Documents include denormalized 'userId' and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence and QAP support.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: taskId
params.description: The unique ID for the Task entry.

definition.description: Subcollection for individual meals logged under a specific daily metric. Documents include denormalized 'userId', 'dailyMetricId', and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: dailyMetricId
params.description: The unique ID for the parent DailyMetric.

params.name: mealId
params.description: The unique ID for the Meal entry.

definition.description: Root collection for system-provided food items. These are publicly readable and generally managed by administrators. Documents should have 'isUserCreated' set to false.
Subcollection for food items created by a specific user. Documents include denormalized 'creatorId' field matching the path 'userId' and 'isUserCreated' set to true for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: foodItemId
params.description: The unique ID for the user-created FoodItem.

definition.description: Subcollection detailing specific food items consumed within a meal. Documents include denormalized 'userId', 'dailyMetricId', 'mealId', and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: dailyMetricId
params.description: The unique ID for the parent DailyMetric.

params.name: mealId
params.description: The unique ID for the parent Meal.

params.name: mealEntryId
params.description: The unique ID for the MealEntry.

definition.description: Root collection for system-provided exercises. These are publicly readable and generally managed by administrators. Documents should have 'isUserCreated' set to false.
Subcollection for exercises created by a specific user. Documents include denormalized 'creatorId' field matching the path 'userId' and 'isUserCreated' set to true for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: exerciseId
params.description: The unique ID for the user-created Exercise.

definition.description: Subcollection for individual workout sessions logged under a specific daily metric. Documents include denormalized 'userId', 'dailyMetricId', and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: dailyMetricId
params.description: The unique ID for the parent DailyMetric.

params.name: workoutId
params.description: The unique ID for the Workout entry.

definition.description: Subcollection detailing specific exercises performed within a workout session. Documents include denormalized 'userId', 'dailyMetricId', 'workoutId', and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: dailyMetricId
params.description: The unique ID for the parent DailyMetric.

params.name: workoutId
params.description: The unique ID for the parent Workout.

params.name: workoutExerciseId
params.description: The unique ID for the WorkoutExercise entry.

definition.description: Subcollection for a user's personal best performances for exercises. Documents include denormalized 'userId' and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence and QAP support.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: personalRecordId
params.description: The unique ID for the PersonalRecord entry.

definition.description: Subcollection for a user's customizable workout routines or 'splits'. Documents include denormalized 'userId' and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence and QAP support.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner.

params.name: workoutSplitId
params.description: The unique ID for the WorkoutSplit.

definition.description: Subcollection representing a single day within a workout split. Documents include denormalized 'userId' (inherited from WorkoutSplit owner), 'workoutSplitId', and 'id' fields matching path parameters for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the UserProfile owner, denormalized from the parent WorkoutSplit.

params.name: workoutSplitId
params.description: The unique ID for the parent WorkoutSplit.

params.name: splitDayId
params.description: The unique ID for the SplitDay.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure for PulseFlow is designed to prioritize Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Access Modeling, ensuring a secure, scalable, and debuggable system. All user-specific data is strictly nested under `/userProfiles/{userId}/` to leverage path-based ownership, simplifying security rules and enhancing privacy. Authorization Independence is achieved through extensive denormalization: for any subcollection document whose access depends on its parent's owner, the parent's `userId` (and relevant parent IDs like `dailyMetricId`, `workoutId`, `mealId`, `workoutSplitId`) are explicitly stored within the child document itself. This eliminates the need for expensive and complex `get()` calls in security rules, enabling atomic operations and robust authorization checks like `resource.data.userId == request.auth.uid`.

Structural Segregation is applied to `FoodItem` and `Exercise` entities, separating system-provided (globally accessible) items from user-created (private to the user) items into distinct collections: `/foodItems` vs. `/userProfiles/{userId}/userFoodItems` and `/exercises` vs. `/userProfiles/{userId}/userExercises`. This ensures that each collection has a homogeneous security posture, making rules clearer and preventing mixed access requirements within a single collection.

QAPs (Query as Authorization Predicates) are inherently supported by this design. For user-owned data, queries against paths like `/userProfiles/{userId}/dailyMetrics` will automatically enforce `userId == request.auth.uid` via security rules. This means the rules act as authorization predicates, not filters, ensuring that only data the user is authorized to see is returned, without additional client-side filtering logic or inefficient full collection scans. For globally readable data like system `FoodItem`s and `Exercises`, rules can simply grant `allow read: if true;` while maintaining tight write restrictions. The consistency in field naming (e.g., `userId`, `creatorId`) and descriptive wildcards further aids in clarity and debuggability.
